---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a simulator error or ANAF API mismatch
title: "[BUG] <short description>"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
Provide a clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Start Docker container...
2. Send POST request to `/oauth/token`...
3. See error...

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened? (e.g., "The UBL XML should include the CIF tag").

## Environment
- OS: (e.g., macOS M2, Windows 11)
- Docker Version:
- Simulator Version: (e.g., v0.3.2)

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots or logs to help explain your problem.
